import json, re, os, sys, textwrap, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics
path_q = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
path_h = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(path_q, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q), type(q)[:0]

import re, unicodedata

arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
tatweel_re = re.compile(r'ـ')
punc_re = re.compile(r'[\u0600-\u06FF]+|.')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    s = s.replace("ٱ","ا").replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا").replace("ى","ي").replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي")
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    s = tatweel_re.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = ' '.join(s.split())
    return s

def strip_non_arabic(s):
    return re.sub(r'[^\u0600-\u06FF\s]', '', s)

span_full = "وَأَخْذِهِمْ بِالْعَذَابِ الْهُونِ * لَمَّا يَأْتِيهِمْ عَذَابٌ مِنْ مَكَانٍ دُونِهِمْ وَلا يَحُورُونَ"
span_norm = normalize_arabic(span_full)
span_norm

cands = []
for rec in q:
    text = rec['ayah_text']
    norm = normalize_arabic(text)
    if all(w in norm for w in ["عذاب","الهون"]) and "واخذهم" in norm:
        cands.append((rec['surah_name'], rec['ayah_id'], text, norm))
len(cands)
